error_signature: ENOENT: no such file or directory
title: File write error due to missing directory
symptom: When attempting to save a file using the Write Files to Disk node, n8n throws an ENOENT error indicating that the specified file or directory does not exist.
applies_when: Using Write Files to Disk node
Directory exists but is not writable
not_this_if: File writes succeed without specifying a path
root_cause: The error occurs when the specified directory for saving files is not accessible or writable by the user under which n8n is running. This can happen if the directory permissions are set incorrectly or if the directory is not mounted properly in a containerized environment.
fix_steps: Check the permissions of the target directory
Ensure that the user running n8n has write access to the directory
If using Docker, verify that the directory is correctly mounted and accessible
agent_instruction: Ensure the target directory is writable by the n8n user and check permissions.
